entry.title: Re: First Article Inspection for EWM managed Storage location
entry.content: Dear Norakois, we are not able to find the "Status Profile" for QIR in Public Cloud. Is there any notes related to this, or we have to ask for it as a new feature in public cloud? thanks!

entry.title: Re: Task 6 - API endpoint with payload required (July Developer Challenge - "Reverse APIs"
entry.content:
@qmacro 

Could you please tell me how to define an action that takes a plain array as input?

I can define an array with a name like this:

action highestValue(input: array of Int32) returns Int32;

But I cannot define it without a name like this:

action highestValue(array of Int32) returns Int32;

entry.title: Re: SAP HANA Based Transformations (Processing transformations in HANA) aka ABAP Based Database Proc
entry.content: Very Nice blog Abhimanyu

entry.title: Maximize Customer Retention with Customer Service Tools in SAP Commerce Cloud
entry.content:
Introduction

Customer service is a key differentiator in today's competitive business world; therefore, this blog aims to assist you in understanding the dynamic features of this module, how it can be transformative for your business, and its real-world applications. Additionally, further modules such as Order Management Services Module and Assistance Service module will be referred here, to complement the usual business process and better illustrate the use cases. The Use Cases and Demo Flow section will focus on the real cases scenarios for improved linkage and understanding.

Business benefits

The SAP Commerce Cloud Customer Service module elevates customer experiences to new levels. Notably, it simplifies interactions through self-service options and reduces the cost of customer support by enabling service reps to focus on complex issues. Also, it boosts customer satisfaction rates through efficient problem resolution.

Below are some of the key business benefits while relying on the activation of the Customer Service Module from SAP Commerce Cloud:

  • Increases customer satisfaction through highly personalized customer service and support.
  • Increases performance of both response time and time-to-resolution.
  • Improves usability, speed, and efficiency through use of a single, highly responsive interface for handling all sales and customer interactions.
  • Supports full website integration enabling CSAs to access the same data and content your customers do.
  • Drives sales and revenue by enabling CSAs to run advanced catalog search and access cross- and up-sell promotions.
  • Provides a unified view of customers to give your CSAs access to customer information and their preferences.
  • Configures your own cross-channel strategy through a modular, highly configurable, widget-based approach.
  • Supports multi-tenancy for streamlining personalized service to customers of multiple brands
  • Saves time on both development and training costs.

Features and Capabilities

The module is equipped with numerous features that optimize customer service.

Some of these include:

  • Designed for the call center environment.
  • Ready-to-use integration with the Order Management Services and the Assisted Service Module.
  • Maximum performance of your customer service agents.
  • Higher usability, speed, and efficiency.
  • Single, highly responsive interface.
  • Keystroke access for quick access to the relevant information.
  • Highly personalized customer service and sales support.
  • The customer service agent sees the same information as the customer.
  • An agent can alert customers about promotions, offers, and cross-/up-sells.
  • Personalized content is visible to the agent as well.
  • The agent sees the same information as the customer does.
  • Support for chat integration.

Real use case scenarios

The Customer Service Module can be used for various scenarios, such as handling customer inquiries, resolving product or service complaints, handling order cancellation, returns, and managing customer profiles. Therefore, to better describe how it works, let focus on two possible real word scenarios where the customer might need support from the customer service team.

*For the phone call interaction, the demos assume the Powertool company has set a contact number for the customers. Also, the customer service team department, integration with an ERP or S/4HANA as well as telephony technology required are considered.

Although before we start, let’s get to know the Personas/roles involved in these use cases and demo flow as well as the industry and business considered:

Personas / Roles

  • Customer Support Agent – Rachel Gloves
  • Customer / B2B Buyer – Mike Rivers

Use cases and Demo Flow

CASE 1 - The customer calls CSR asking for support on partial order cancellation.

CASE 2 - The customer raises a ticket request to complain about an invalid coupon.

Industry and Type of Business

Powertool Manufacturing and Business-to-Business

Use Cases and Demo Flow

Therefore, let's now jump to each of the use cases and demo flow.

CASE 1 - The customer Mike Rivers calls the Customer service team asking for support on partial order cancellation.

Mike River just bought some products from the Powertool Manufacturing storefront and after rechecking the internal stock, he did realize the quantities requested are not correct, hence he needs to cancel some items from the past order partially. As the below image shows, the initial request considered 5 Standard and other 5 Professional screwdrivers:

As Mike Rivers is new in the Powertool Manufacturing site, he decided to call the service team, seeking support to guide him on the process to partially cancel items from the last order. After checking the Powertool Manufacturing contact, he then called towards the customer service team. Therefore, Rachel Gloves from Customer Service team picks up the call and start interacting with the Mike Rivers.

So here, Rachel Gloves from Customer Service team has some options to support the Mike Rivers while relying on the standard capabilities of the SAP Commerce Cloud – Customer Service module.

1) Rachel Gloves may explain how the customers may process with the partial order cancellation on their end, launching the ASM tool from the Backoffice:

And check the order history with the customers. In the order summary, the customer could then initial the cancel order easily. So here, imagining that Mark Rivers needs to reduce the professional screwdriver to 3, he could manage that from the cancel order option:

And submit this request:

However, another option could be 2) as Mark River - says he is not able to manage it on his end, then Rachel Gloves can perform this request on the customer's behalf.

To accomplish this, Rachel Gloves would go towards the Customer Support module via SAP Commerce Cloud Backoffice and look for the Mike River order placed:

After that, start the partial order cancelation as instructed by Mark Rivers:

Proceeding to the reduction of quantity and confirm the selection:

After performing this action, the order history will be tracked both in the customer service module backoffice:

And the Mike River will also see the updated action on the Powertool Manufacturing site:

*Also emails to inform the customers about the order status changes are considered. For more, please check here: E-mails in Backoffice Customer Support Cockpit and Configuring Emails.

CASE 2 - The customer raises a ticket request to complain about an invalid coupon.

 Now, picturing Mike Rivers is more mature in the Powertool Manufacturing, and instead of calling the Customer Service team, he basically decided to raise a ticket request in the Powertool Manufacturing. The request is about an invalid coupon code that he has tried tout o use while placing an order.

Hence, to raise such a request, Mark River goes to the customer service option:

And create the request, explaining the situation:

After submitting the request, Mark River can see the status and review any relevant information:

Given that, in the Backoffice – Customer Support, Rachel Gloves will be able to see the request and act upon the subject:

After picking up the correct request, all the necessary information will be available for the customer service team support the customer:

Hence from here, Rachel Gloves may start interacting with Mark Rivers and message the customer to resolve the request:

After sending the message, Mark River can be informed via email and the message will also be available in the Powertools site under the customer service option:

With that, Mark River is now informed and can then proceed with the new order and close the request, as a new promo code has been provided.

Likewise, these updates from Mark Rivers will be reflected in the customer service module accordingly:

Important Considerations / Notes to be taken in attention.

For successful implementation and adoption, businesses must thoroughly define their service team's hours and commitment to responding to customer queries. The size of the service team also plays a critical role, as it must be in accordance with the business's demand and customer interaction frequency. In the case of multi-site or regional operations, specific strategies must be designed to offer seamless support. Robust organization and attention to infrastructure are essential prerequisites as well. With that said, we recommend a proper business process definition in place to manage the impact and efficiency to better assess the whole purpose of having customer service using the Customer Service Module from SAP Commerce Cloud rather than relying on the CRM system to manage it. Hence, for complex use cases or high-demand support, we recommend an appropriate assessment to review the best option for your use cases.  Please also take a look at this blog for further reference: The seamless ticketing support journey between SAP Commerce Cloud and SAP Service Cloud

Useful Links

To dive deeper into the world of SAP Commerce Cloud's Customer Service Module, Order and Returns and Assisted Service Module, please follow these links:

  • Customer Service Module
  • Users in Backoffice Customer Support Cockpit
  • Backoffice Customer Support Cockpit
  • E-mails in Backoffice Customer Support Cockpit
  • Creating a New Ticket
  • Accessing Customer Data
  • Backoffice Customer Support Cockpit - Orders and Returns
  • Assisted Service Module

Conclusion

SAP Commerce Cloud’s Customer Service along with both Order Management Services and Assisted Service module may transform your customer service game, armed with its extensive capabilities and benefits. It attentively caters to the needs of the new-age customer while ensuring your business operations become more streamlined and efficient. Whether your organization is small, medium, or even large-scale, adopting SAP Commerce Cloud’s Customer Service Module is a worthwhile advantage in enhancing customer satisfaction.

We hope you have enjoyed the reading,
Thank you,

Luciano Monteiro,

CX Solution Value Advisory team.

entry.title: Re: Career progression for CPI consultants
entry.content:
@Distinct_Sky ,

Thanks for the question, I can provide my personal suggestion/perspective.

Since you are already have an experience in PI/PO, the next would be take a certification on SAP Integration Suite and also do an career advancement in SAP Build Services with Process Automation and Explore the SAP AI Portfolio services along with the services you mentioned below like SAP Event Mesh or API Management. 

Otherwise, you can look at the career developement of Technical Architect; Integration Architect or SAP Enterprise Architect 

Explore the SAP Learning Journeys (as a developer) : https://learning.sap.com/learning-journeys?page=1&roles=developer 

Hope this helps. 

Best Regards,
Sri

entry.title: Re: Understanding SAP RAP, CAP, Build, Joule, Embedded Analytics: A Simple Guide
entry.content: Small correction: RAP ist not restful as it saves a state on the server e.g. when storing drafts.

entry.title: SAP Service and Asset Manager Integration with SAP Analytics Cloud(SAC) using MAIF data sources
entry.content:
SAP Service and Asset Manager(SSAM) mobile application for maintenance and field service execution, which helps your organization to optimize asset health and performance by providing persona centric mobile solution with best-in-class customer service. Current pain point from customers on how to measure meantime to repair and meantime to complete the work using the SSAM mobile application. This article explains about how you can use the data points from SSAM to build intelligent operational dashboards to support your organization to maximize technician productivity and streamline the maintenance process. 

Mobile Application Integration Framework(MAIF) supports integration topics for SAP Service and Asset Manager, MAIF stores mobile operational data such transaction history, user specific data, location info, communication session info etc. in the SAP backend system(S/4HANA Public/Private/On-Prem) which can be used to create analytical dashboards via Stories to visualize data using the optimized design experience. 

SAP Analytics Cloud (SAC) is a public Software-as-a-Service (SaaS) enabling access to on-premise and cloud data sources. Furthermore, SAP Analytics Cloud provides live connection (online) to on-premise or cloud systems, build stories based on those models, and perform online analysis without any data replication.

Prerequisites:

  1. Before starting, please, read cautiously the System Requirements and Technical Prerequisites document and check if your landscape is compliant with what is supported, for your version and Connection types. 
  2. Create and provision your SAP Analytical Cloud tenant in SAP BTP Cockpit. Please refer to the latest version of SAP documentation, Create Your SAP Analytics Cloud Instance in SAP BTP Cockpit
  3. Install following SAP notes into SAP S/4HANA system to get the latest CDS analytical views from SSAM mobile backend:
    1. 3471336 - Analytical Query for Mobile Transaction History
    2. 3481198 - Analytical Queries for MAIF Monitoring Purposes

SAP Analytics Cloud Live Connection to S/4HANA backend

For this integration, we used Direct Live Connection with CORS, so the Analytic Query of CDS View can be the source in S/4HANA where we provided predefined CDS analytical views for SSAM data points. For more details about Live Connection between SAC and S/4HANA system, please refer to the SAP help documentation Live Connections Overview and Live Data Connections to SAP S/4HANA for detailed steps on the setup.

SAP Analytics Cloud provides the business logic, and build the queries required to see your data to your browser.  Your browser in turn sends those queries, through Direct live connection to the S/4HANA database. The results of those queries are returned to the browser, where any charts are rendered. Throughout the whole process, the browser is actually interacting through Direct live connection (CORS), which in turn sends out the requests to SAP Analytics Cloud or the remote data source depending on the path of each request.

Source: SAP Help documentation

Once the Live connection is setup between SAC tenant and S/4HANA system, you should be able to access CDS analytical views from SAP Service and Asset Manager backend(MAIF) data source. 

Before you create Stories for analytical dashboard, you need to get your model ready so that you can use this as a data source for your story. For more information on Modeler setup, please refer to Learn About Models

Create a Model from a Live Data Connection

Follow the steps listed under the SAP help documentation, Create a model from a Live Data Connection to setup the mobile analytical model using the CDS views from the SAP S/4HANA backend. In Step4, where you are trying to input the Data Source, you can search for "Mobile" to list all available CDS analytical views for SSAM mobile application. But if you know the data source, you can also enter the name of the data source directly as well.

If you do not see the list of CDS views specific to mobile scenarios, your S/4HANA system version does not contain the latest updates from SAP Service and Asset Manager mobile backend. Please apply the following SAP notes to get these CDS analytical views and try again. 

  1. 3471336 - Analytical Query for Mobile Transaction History
  2. 3481198 - Analytical Queries for MAIF Monitoring Purposes

Create Stories using the above Data Model

Stories are dashboards where you represent data by capturing insights and visualizations using Charts, Tables, Geo Maps etc. Your story acts as a container object that holds all the data, visualizations, and other elements that you want to explore and share. When you first create your story, you’ll decide how you want to organize and consume your content by defining story-level settings, choosing specific page types and other elements to define the structure and delivery format of your story, such as enabling it to be viewed on mobile devices, and applying best practices to optimize your story’s performance.

For more information about Stories and related content, please refer to Getting Started with Stories.

Once you are familiar with the Stories, Create a new Story using the Data model which is prepared in the previous step "Create a Model from a Live Data Connection". While creating new stories using Create New Stories section, in Step5, select the data model source you created before, such as "Mobile Transaction History" to visualize data in Charts or Table format depending on the widget you choose at the time of creation. 

You can add multiple Charts or Tables in a dashboard to visualize data elements that you want to explore by choosing different Measures & Dimensions for each Chart or Table from the same data source as shown below:

You can add Filters to restrict the data to a specific criteria such as Mobile Application version etc to refine data output depending on the business need as shown below: 

Also, you can create Digital Boardroom Dashboards by importing multiple Stories from different data sources and present real time data to allow you to make fact-based decisions to drive your business. For more information on Digital Dashboards, please refer to Digital Boardroom Presentation.

Conclusion: 

SAP Service and Asset Manager(SSAM) mobile application integration to SAP Analytics Cloud(SAC), provides best-in-class visualization dashboards to measure meantime to repair and meantime to complete the work to support your organization and maximize technician productivity. These operational dashboards will help Maintenance Planners/Supervisors to plan their future work and streamline the maintenance process. 

Please provide your feedback to improve the product features. Also, encourage you to follow the Mobile Application Integration Framework post and answer questions (https://answers.sap.com/tags/6baf0d27-c212-4154-85a9-71ed13c7b1ab), and read other posts on the topic for MAIF (https://blogs.sap.com/tags/6baf0d27-c212-4154-85a9-71ed13c7b1ab/) and SAP SAM (https://blogs.sap.com/tags/73555000100800000639/).

SAP Service and Asset Manager application metadata is available on the SAP Support Portal Software Center and the mobile client may be downloaded from the Apple App Store and Google Play Store. The Windows application is available for customers and partners from the SAP Download Center, navigate to SAP SERVICE AND ASSET MANAGER > MOB SERVICE ASSET MANAGER WIN > MOB SVC ASSET MANAGER WIN x.x > MOB SVC ASSET MANAGER WIN x.x (choose latest version from the list).

We look forward to your comments. Stay up to date with latest news and post your questions or feedback about SAP Mobile in the Q&A area. Start by visiting our SAP Mobile Experience community page and click “follow”. We’ll be publishing more informative blog posts. Want to be notified? Check your #communications to ensure you have your notifications activated.

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)

entry.title: Re: CPI to S4 Hana Sales Order Creation
entry.content:
@Parth08 

Thanks for the question. 

Did you check the payload for the creation of the sales order for POST -HTTP method. Also, please check Salesorder field is missing, guess it is from internal number range ?

Sri

entry.title: Re: Unable to do SMT Mapping for the fields present in MA...
entry.content:
Hi

This looks to be a design issue. Ideally it would be created as a separate entity and not viewed as extension of MARC as these are two different tables. 

Regards

entry.title: Re: ABAP CDS Views: Is it possible to Select Single?
entry.content: Part 2 is here: https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-members/abap-cds-views-is-it-possible-to-select-single-part-2-of-2/ba-p/13765293

entry.title: Re: credit segment missing in replication of Business Partner
entry.content: Did anybody find a solution to replicate the credit segment data ?

entry.title: Re: Performing Regression Testing with SAP X Solution Man...
entry.content: Dear Customer， SAP does not have a specific recommendation for third-party tools HUFT, Selenium, or Tricentis. It is important for organizations to evaluate these tools based on their specific requirements and choose the one that best fits their needs. SAP does, however, offer integration and compatibility with various third-party testing tools, so organizations can choose the tool that aligns with their testing strategy and goals.

entry.title: SAC Hyperlink doesn't show Account dimension
entry.content:
Hi folks,

When attempting to link to an external URL, Account is not appearing as a selectable dimension despite being present in the model & table we are using to link from.

We would like to avoid needing to solve this through scripting, as this seems like something that should be achievable through the normal functionality, just like all of the other dimensions.
Is it the case that Account is not available in hyperlinks for some reason? If so, why?

entry.title: Re: Business Partner Role gets deleted in S/4 when data is replicated from MDG Hub
entry.content:
Hi Aasim,

I am trying to replicate credit segment information to an external system. For some reason, information including credit limit and and credit block is unavailable as part of the PB replication outbound payload. Will you be able to shed some light on this?

Kind Regards

Shantha

entry.title: Re: S4HC- Create the billing document for down payment
entry.content:
Hi Doreen

Thank you for your replying.

Yes, I was referring Sales Order Processing with Customer Down Payment (scope item BKJ).

Order Type : Standard Order (OR)  

Billing Plan : There are two stages of payment, as shown in the attached.

I attempted to change the billing type of down payment  from down payment request to Invoice(F2), but it did not generate two invoices.

Can I issue an invoice for the deposit amount as soon as I receive the customer's deposit ?

After completing the entire process, I expect to have two invoice: one for the down payment and one for the closing invoice.

thanks~

entry.title: Re: Task 6 - API endpoint with payload required (July Developer Challenge - "Reverse APIs"
entry.content: Task 6

entry.title: Re: SAP Adobe Form - Data Binding using Global Data and use of FM FP_FUNCTION_XML_INTERFACE
entry.content:
Dear Abhijeet Tikar,
 
Permit me to elaborate on my comprehension:
1. As an Import Data, it can't be used in different variable fields in one form.
2. When we use FM [FP_FUNCTION_MODULE_NAME], we can't transport data to global fields
 
That's why we have to use FM [FP_FUNCTION_XML_INTERFACE] to transport data to global fields.
 
So, is it the same as following method?
1. Import HU number to a import data
2. Set this HU number to a global field via routine in ADF.
3. Binding this global field to multiple fields on the form.
 
Chad

entry.title: how to register Web Client on Cloud Control Center
entry.content:
Hi All

Hope all is well.  We need help how to setup Web Client on cloud Control center

On this image we maange to install the Web Client on the SLD and able to open it

 

But as you can see we can see all database. Is there any solution to see only the database of the client

On this image we are trying to register the web Client but register button is grey

Hope someone can advise us how to resolve this issue on CCC Web Client

Thank

Zernan

entry.title: Re: Data Access Control in Modeler in SAP Analytics Cloud
entry.content:
Hi Kristina33 , 

   Have you checked model privacy concept of SAC? It allows you to define data security cross multiple dimensions. 

https://help.sap.com/doc/00f68c2e08b941f081002fd3691d86a7/2023.11/en-US/b450f5f7946340fd8240e14f5258caae.html

Best regards, William

entry.title: Help Needed: Error Importing Currency Tables (ODP) - SAP.CURRENCY.TABLE.TCURR
entry.content:
Dear Datasphere Community,

I’m encountering an issue while importing currency tables, specifically with the exchange rates using ODP. The import process is failing, and I am unable to resolve the error associated with SAP.CURRENCY.TABLE.TCURR.

Could anyone provide guidance or steps to troubleshoot and fix this issue?

Thank you in advance for your assistance.

Priyanka

entry.title: Export custom report as csv file
entry.content:
I would like to export custom report as csv file in s4hana system.

Currently, there is only 2 options to export "excel" and "pdf" in custom report.

Is there any other ways to export as csv file?

Best Regards,

KhaingZin

entry.title: Re: BTP FinOps: Keeping Track of your Credits
entry.content:
Very nice blog post + github repo.

Other than the business purpose, this application is a very good practice on SAP BTP ( SAC/HANA Cloud + Development + Workzone)!

entry.title: 🇬🇪 SAP Cloud Application Programming Model with SAP HANA Cloud (Tbilisi, Georgia)
entry.content:
This SAP CodeJam event is about combining the SAP Cloud Application Programming Model with SAP HANA Cloud to create full-stack applications. In this CodeJam, we will learn how to deploy and configure an instance of the SAP HANA Cloud trial, develop a multi-target application using SAP Business Application Studio and the SAP Cloud Application Programming Model, and create a service layer and SAP Fiori UI that also includes SAP HANA native artifacts such as calculation views.

Location

Tbilisi, Georgia (EPAM Georgia, InOffice Building, 10 Bidzina Kvernadze St, Tbilisi 0171, Georgia) 

  • This is an in-person event only (not virtual)
  • We would like also to invite you to join newly established official Group of Tbilisi in SAP Community where you can find latest SAP relevant news and events for Georgian community  https://community.sap.com/t5/tbilisi/gh-p/tbilisi

Date

Wednesday, September 18, 2024, from 9:00 to 16:30 local time in Tbilisi, Georgia (GET, Georgia Standard Time)

  • A light lunch will be served.

Language

English

The instructors are SAP Developer Advocates Daniel Wroblewski and Shrinivasan Neelamegam.

Please note that spaces are limited to 30. 

  • If you want to attend, register by clicking the Yes button in the Will you be attending? section. After 30 signups, you can still sign up and you will be placed on a waiting list.

Prerequisites

  • Bring your own laptop with power adapter and have a supported Web browser such as Google Chrome or Firefox installed on your laptop.
  • There are essential pre-requisites that must be completed by every attendee before arriving at the event location. They are documented here:   https://github.com/SAP-samples/cap-hana-exercises-codejam/blob/main/prerequisites.md. (Choose Normal Prerequisites)

entry.title: Identifying right role with SAP ecosystem
entry.content:
I worked in the SAP ecosystem for almost 15 years. My first job was as a Junior SAP Basis, and I was working towards becoming a Project Manager or Coordinator. In 2018, I had the opportunity to migrate to Canada. With my 15 years of experience working for large enterprises like British American Tobacco and Shell, I thought I would be an ideal candidate to secure a job with major SAP customers in North America.

Unfortunately, I was wrong. I never had the opportunity to return to work in the SAP ecosystem. After six years, I am currently working as a ServiceNow Administrator.

However, I still have an interest in doing something related to the SAP ecosystem, whether it be as a Project Coordinator, Test Coordinator, Release Coordinator, or any role as part of a Support or Project team. My previous experience is mostly related to the SAP Non-HANA environment, but with everyone expected to migrate to SAP HANA, is there any recommended training?

entry.title: unable to delete items from Cart in Shopping App in SAP Build Apps
entry.content:
Hi,

I am follwing the tutorials 7 - Trigger Process from Your App: STEP 6 , and when I click on Purchase, it is giving me the below pop-up. I am unable to delete some items in the cart. The Delete icon functionality is not working. I am not sure if I missed any thing during during the build. Can you please help me on how to delete the last two items from the cart?

 

Thanks,

Bharath

entry.title: Where is the reference3 field in supplier invoice
entry.content:
I'm processing Create FI Document for Entertainment Expense of J58 script. 

(4.51.1    Create FI Document for Entertainment Expense (Posting to an Employee Account))

I think this process is for Korean company especially. The file may be different with the versions of other countries, so I attached the test script J58 for South Korea.

In Procedure 10, I can't find the field of Reference3 and description.

Where are these fields? Is there anything else I need to set up for this ?

 

I asked this question previously at sap for me and I was replied like following:

Reference Key 3 NOT visible in Create Supplier Invoice app

As mentioned in KBA 2916253, it is not possible to manually fill the Reference Key 3 in the supplier invoice screen because this field is not available within the transaction. This is explained in the consulting note 904652. 
Please see attached KBAs 2916253 and 904652.

Then the test script is wrong? In the script, indicated that enter the data at reference3 field.  I attached the screenshots of J58 script.

(And the supplier invoice I would like to process don't refer to purchase order.)

entry.title: IAS Admins with only reset password access in IAS admin console
entry.content:
Hi Team,

We are implementing IAS in our Production instance. We have a requirement from post go-live support team to provide admin access to some Successfactors admins with only "reset password access in IAS admin console". 

We are not sure if it's possible to achieve this and how.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: IAS Admins with only reset password access in IAS adm...
entry.content:
Please apply solution in the following KBA:

3402168 - Authorizations Based on Policies: How to allow only to reset password

entry.title: Re: LLM Fine-tuning
entry.content:
Hi  Mathis,

Such a great article, thanks a lot!

I really appreciate the links to relevant reading material as well.

It help our team a lot.

Appreciated it.

 

Regards,

ZFiori.

 

🙂

entry.title: Re: Register new Service Unit in Cloud Control Center
entry.content:
Hello, 

 

Please make sure database server for Service Unit is up and learning and SLD agent for the database server is correctly installed and running too. 

SLD agent on the DB server should appear in the Cloud Control Center under Landscape Management > SLD Agents.

 

Regards

EunSeok

entry.title: Cos'è il codice referral Bitget?
entry.content:
Scambio di criptovaluta:Bitget
Codice Referral Bitget:bet168
Commissione di sconto:Fino a 50%
Bonus di benvenuto:Bonus da $ 1000 USDT
Tasso di sconto e bonus:Sconto a vita del 100% e bonus USDT da $ 1000

Cerchi i codici referral Bitget per il 2024? Dal 28 luglio 2024, utilizza il codice "bet168" quando registri un conto su Bitget per sbloccare bonus speciali durante tutto l'anno. Condividi il tuo codice di riferimento con amici e familiari per ottenere uno sconto del 50% sulle commissioni di trading su Bitget, un exchange di criptovalute sicuro e rinomato a livello mondiale. Bitget fornisce una piattaforma affidabile per scambiare Bitcoin, Ethereum, USDT, EOS e molte altre criptovalute. Inizia il tuo viaggio nel trading con i vantaggi aggiuntivi del codice di invito "bet168" e invita altri a iscriversi per un'esperienza gratificante.Cerchi i codici referral Bitget per il 2024? Dal 28 luglio 2024, utilizza il codice "bet168" quando registri un conto su Bitget per sbloccare bonus speciali durante tutto l'anno. Condividi il tuo codice di riferimento con amici e familiari per ottenere uno sconto del 50% sulle commissioni di trading su Bitget, un exchange di criptovalute sicuro e rinomato a livello mondiale. Bitget fornisce una piattaforma affidabile per scambiare Bitcoin, Ethereum, USDT, EOS e molte altre criptovalute. Inizia il tuo viaggio nel trading con i vantaggi aggiuntivi del codice di invito "bet168" e invita altri a iscriversi per un'esperienza gratificante.

entry.title: How to add Params:warningAcknowledged and workflowConfirmed into SF batch upsert
entry.content:
Hi all

I need to add below 2 parameters when I calling SF batch upsert method. I Can't find the way to passing the parameter in CPI. Need all you guys help.😥

  • workflowConfirmed=true
  • warningAcknowledged=true

My CPI settings:

SF ODATA API Example (single data upsert):

https://<API-Server>/odata/v2/upsert?workflowConfirmed=true&warningAcknowledged=true

entry.title: Jaki jest kod polecający Bitget?
entry.content:
Giełda kryptowalut:Bitget
Kod polecający Bitget:bet168
Opłata rabatowa:Do 50%
Bonus powitalny:Premia 1000 USDT
Stopa rabatowa i premia:100% zniżki na całe życie i premia 1000 USDT

Szukasz kodów polecających Bitget na rok 2024? Od 28 lipca 2024 użyj kodu "bet168" podczas rejestracji konta na Bitget, aby odblokować specjalne bonusy przez cały rok. Udostępnij swój kod polecający znajomym i rodzinie, aby uzyskać 50% zniżki na opłaty transakcyjne na Bitget, bezpiecznej, znanej na całym świecie giełdzie kryptowalut. Bitget zapewnia zaufaną platformę do handlu Bitcoinem, Ethereum, USDT, EOS i wieloma innymi kryptowalutami. Rozpocznij swoją podróż handlową z dodatkowymi korzyściami, jakie daje kod zaproszenia "bet168" i zaproś innych, aby dołączyli, aby uzyskać satysfakcjonujące doświadczenie.Szukasz kodów polecających Bitget na rok 2024? Od 28 lipca 2024 użyj kodu "bet168" podczas rejestracji konta na Bitget, aby odblokować specjalne bonusy przez cały rok. Udostępnij swój kod polecający znajomym i rodzinie, aby uzyskać 50% zniżki na opłaty transakcyjne na Bitget, bezpiecznej, znanej na całym świecie giełdzie kryptowalut. Bitget zapewnia zaufaną platformę do handlu Bitcoinem, Ethereum, USDT, EOS i wieloma innymi kryptowalutami. Rozpocznij swoją podróż handlową z dodatkowymi korzyściami, jakie daje kod zaproszenia "bet168" i zaproś innych, aby dołączyli, aby uzyskać satysfakcjonujące doświadczenie.

entry.title: Re: SAP Integration Suite – Generative AI based Integration Flow Generation
entry.content:
Hi ChanduKrishna,

Thanks. This feature is not available in trial account. It is only available for premium editions.

Thanks

Deepak

entry.title: SAP 分析云 2024.14版功能更新
entry.content:
SAP 分析云是一款先进的商务分析云解决方案，集商业智能（BI）、增强分析、预测分析和企业规划功能于一体，消除单点解决方案和数据孤岛挑战，能提供您需要的全面云分析功能。

本文介绍了 SAP 分析云 2024.14 版本的新功能。这些新功能已经在 SAP 分析云 FastTrack 客户的系统上线。对于 SAP 分析云季度发布周期（QRC）客户，此版本及其功能将作为 QRC 2024年第3季度版本的一部分提供。在此处可以查看 QRC 发布时间表。 

 

系统和技术要求

尽管不是必需的，我们推荐您升级到最新的 SAP 分析云代理版本1.0.409，以利用所有数据采集类型。

代理的最低版本仍为 1.0.75，但以下情况除外：

  • SAP ERP/SQL 数据库的版本 1.0.99
  • SAP universe （UNX） 的版本 1.0.365（SAP 分析云代理需要其他设置步骤，有关详细信息，请参阅 SAP 说明 3262098）
  • SAP Business Warehouse （BW） 的版本 1.0.353
  • SAP HANA View 的版本 1.0.235
  • File Server版本 1.0.248

有关详细信息，请参阅系统要求和技术先决条件。

有关SAP BW与SAP分析云集成的支持功能和需求更新，请参阅SAP Note 2541557了解更多详细信息。

有关通过 SAP分析云的 SAP BusinessObjects Live Data Connect 实时访问 Universe 时的支持功能和需求更新，请参阅 SAP Note 2771921了解更多详细信息。

请从“Service Marketplace”下载最新版本的简易部署工具包。

  • 注意：为避免下载旧版本，以及可能让用户面对Cloud Connector 与 SAPJVM 或 Apache Tomcat 的不当绑定问题，只有三个最新版本的工具包可供下载。

有关云代理版本变更管理详情，请参阅 SAP Note 3264839。

 

更新亮点 

  • 数据发掘
    • 实时 SAP BW - 报表至报表接口 (RRI) |（SAP 路线图浏览器)
    • 基于 SAP HANA 模型的单位位置
    • 数据分析器图表增强
    • 在“选择模型”对话框中支持 SAP Datasphere 文件夹
    • 计算对话框：转换函数
    • 计算编辑器增强功能
  • 数据建模
    • 标准单位转换 |（SAP 路线图浏览器)
  • 企业计划
    • 数据操作和多步操作 - 支持账户或度量输入控件的参数 |（SAP 路线图浏览器)
    • 计划输入 - 数据文件上传（最终用户） |（SAP 路线图浏览器)
    • 计划流程管理 - 对日历通知进行分组的管理员选项 |（SAP 路线图浏览器)
    • 价值动因树 - 灵活设置级联样式表的样式 |（SAP 路线图浏览器)
    • 支持在“留言”中使用单位转换
  • Microsoft Office 集成
    • Microsoft PowerPoint 加载项
      • 与 Microsoft PowerPoint 集成 |（SAP 路线图浏览器)
  • 移动分析
    • Android 移动设备中支持生物识别 |（SAP 路线图浏览器)
  • 故事设计
    • 精简查看器中的新支持 |（SAP 路线图浏览器)
    • 表：支持无值模式的高级筛选器 |（SAP 路线图浏览器)
    • 故事计算的描述 |（SAP 路线图浏览器)
    • 垂直筛选器面板 - 页面筛选器重新排序 |（SAP 路线图浏览器)
  • 故事可扩展性
    • 跨页面弹出窗口微件 |（SAP 路线图浏览器)
    • 保存带有脚本的故事 |（SAP 路线图浏览器)
    • 区段导出打印
    • 组合增强：将微件属性暴露为组合属性表
  • 用户协作
    • 在留言微件中显示最近添加的留言 |（SAP 路线图浏览器)
    • 故事留言配置 |（SAP 路线图浏览器)
    • 使用PowerPoint 格式计划优化故事体验 |（SAP 路线图浏览器)
    • 在电子邮件正文中预览计划和交付故事内容

 

数据发掘 

实时 SAP BW - 报表至报表接口 (RRI)

作为数据分析器的用户，现在可以在SAP BW实时连接中使用报表至报表接口 (RRI)，从已执行的查询 (发送方) 跳转到另一份报表 (接收方)，如RRI后端事务 (RSBBS) 中维护的那样。支持以下类型：SAP BW 查询、事务、网页地址、ABABP 报表。报表至报表界面在数据分析器中打开SAP BW 查询类型的接收方报表。（SAP 路线图浏览器)

注意：使用实时连接时，请考虑SAP Analytics Cloud功能的SAP BW版本依赖项。有关功能支持的更多详细信息，请参SAP Note 2715030。

 

基于 SAP HANA 的模型的单位位置

在数据分析器中使用基于 SAP HANA 的模型时，可以在行、标题或值单元格中显示度量/账户的单位、货币和数级。作为数据分析器用户，您可以使用此选择将此设置存储在洞察中。

注意：请考虑使用实时连接的 SAP HANA EPM MDS 版本依赖性，如 SAP Note 2444261 中所述。

数据分析器图表增强

对于数据分析器中的统计图，已进行了一些用户体验增强，并解决了一些已知问题。

  • 提高统计图的响应性：
    • 已将数据标签移出统计图区域
    • 调整滚动条

在“选择模型”对话框中支持 SAP Datasphere 文件夹

在数据分析器的“选择模型”对话框中打开 SAP Datasphere 连接以开始新分析时，现在可以按名称、说明和所有者对 SAP Datasphere 空间进行排序。

此外，在“选择模型”对话框中，现在可以看到空间内的文件夹并进行导航。

计算对话框：转换函数

作为数据分析器中计算编辑器的用户，你现在可以在创建公式时使用以下转换函数：

  • DECFLOAT
  • DOUBLE
  • FLOAT
  • INT
  • FLOOR

计算编辑器增强功能

计算编辑器通过标记化增强，以提高清晰度和用户友好性。每个对象维、维属性、维层次结构或度量）现在可以作为标记删除。

 

数据建模

标准单位转换

现在，您可以在包含度量的模型上创建单位类型的换算度量。单位转换度量可以使用标准单位转换表中的值，将基本度量中的源值转换为属于同一单位组的指定目标单位。

您还可以在故事和分析应用中创建附加单位换算度量、基于换算添加计算所得度量或使用转换值。“标准单位转换”表可从“建模器”的“转换”选项卡中进行参考。（SAP 路线图浏览器)

如需了解更多信息，请查看 @AmandaJMurphy 发布的博文。

 

企业计划

数据操作和多步操作－支持账户或度量输入控件参数

设置数据操作或多步操作的启动者时，现在可以使用度量和账户作为输入控件。（SAP 路线图浏览器)

 

计划输入 - 数据文件上传（最终用户）

用户现在可以直接从本地 Excel 或 CSV 文件上载数据。必须在数据管理工作区中创建上载作业，然后在故事的启动器微件中引用。（SAP 路线图浏览器)

 

计划流程管理 - 对日历通知进行分组的管理员选项

现在，管理员可以将日历通知电子邮件分组为摘要电子邮件，并在特定时间每天发送给所有用户。请注意，批量编辑的提醒电子邮件和摘要电子邮件不在此分组之外，并单独发送。（SAP 路线图浏览器)

 

价值动因树 - 灵活设置级联样式表的样式

现在，使用故事主题设置和级联样式表（CSS）可以更改值驱动树微件的所有颜色。（SAP 路线图浏览器）

 

支持在“留言”中使用单位转换

现在，您可以在表中将数据点留言添加到源自单位换算度量的数据单元格。在留言中，还将为数据单元格的“原始值”显示单位。

Microsoft Office 集成

Microsoft PowerPoint 加载项 - 与 Microsoft PowerPoint 集成

这是适用于 Microsoft PowerPoint 的 SAP Analytics Cloud 加载项的初始版本。该加载项是完全基于 Web 的产品，可用于在 PowerPoint 演示文稿中嵌入 SAP Analytics Cloud 微件。可以随时刷新微件的数据，以在演示中引入准确可信的数据，而无需再次从 SAP Analytics Cloud 系统复制/粘贴信息。有关加载项的更多信息，请查看 SAP Help Portal 中的 SAP Analytics Cloud 的 Microsoft PowerPoint 加载项。（SAP 路线图浏览器）

 

移动分析 

Android 移动设备中支持生物识别

用户现在可以使用 TouchID 登录到 SAP Analytics Cloud Android 版移动 APP。（SAP 路线图浏览器)

 

故事设计

精简查看器中的新支持

精简查看器现在支持以下内容：（SAP 路线图浏览器)

  • 地理地图中的深度图图层
  • 查看模式下的故事
  • 演示模式下的故事：
    • 已配置的演示结构
    • 折叠的导航面板
    • 工具栏中的隐藏筛选器或导航按钮

 

表：支持无值模式的高级筛选器

在优化故事体验中，现在可以使用高级筛选器创建表布局时隐藏不需要的无值成员，这对于 ad-hoc 计划尤为重要。（SAP 路线图浏览器)

 

故事计算的描述

计算描述现在可以包含动态文本，该文本将根据选定的输入值更新故事微件中显示的计算名称。（SAP 路线图浏览器)

 

垂直筛选器面板 - 页面筛选器重新排序

在优化故事体验中，故事设计人员现在可以更改筛选器面板设置中页面筛选器的顺序，和故事筛选器排序的方式相同。定义的顺序将应用于垂直筛选器面板，该面板只有页面筛选器部分（处于查看和编辑模式），并将与故事一起保存。（SAP 路线图浏览器)

 

故事可扩展性

跨页面弹出窗口微件

作为优化故事体验中的故事开发人员，现在可以创建一个故事弹出窗口，故事中的任何页面都可以使用该弹出窗口。还可以将现有页面弹出窗口转换为故事弹出窗口。（SAP 路线图浏览器)

保存带有脚本的故事

故事开发人员现在可以选择“允许设计人员在“故事详细信息”中使用脚本来编辑和保存故事，以便故事设计人员可以使用脚本来编辑和保存故事，而不是使用只读视图。脚本对他们来说仍然是隐藏的，当删除包含脚本或被脚本引用的项目时，他们会收到警告。 （SAP 路线图浏览器)

区段导出打印

优化故事体验中的 PDF 或 PPTX 导出现在支区段微件。作为故事开发人员，可以在配置“导出为 PDF”或“导出到 PPTX”技术对象时包括区段，以便也可以通过脚本 API 导出这些区段。

组合增强：将微件属性暴露为组合属性表

作为组合创建者，你可以定义一个界面属性，让故事设计人员根据故事上下文对其进行自定义。可以为特定微件在查看时的可见性定义布尔属性，也可以在组合中的特定微件元素中定义文本的字符串属性。

因此，作为优化故事体验中的故事设计人员，你可以修改组合创建者定义和公开的属性，例如统计图标题、表的超级链接 URL 或按钮在故事组件中的查看时可见性。

 

用户协作

在留言微件中显示最近添加的留言

在故事中的留言微件上，现在可以选择查看最近添加的留言。（SAP 路线图浏览器)

 

故事留言配置

现在，您可以使用开关启用或禁用故事中的留言。通过禁用故事留言，用户将无法添加或查看留言。但是，他们仍可以对数据点留言和维度留言进行操作。（SAP 路线图浏览器)

 

使用PowerPoint 格式计划优化故事体验

现在可以使用 PowerPoint (.pptx) 的格式计划故事发布。 （SAP 路线图浏览器)

 

在电子邮件正文中预览计划和交付故事内容

现在使用电子邮件传送选项，您可以选择以下选项之一来发布故事：

  • 附件
  • 附件和内嵌预览
  • 内嵌预览

如果选择“内嵌预览”，则故事内容将在电子邮件正文中提供。

 

本文仅提供 SAP 分析云的最新功能和改进功能的高级概述。您可以在针对FastTrack客户的应用内帮助指南中找到有关这些功能的更多详细信息，如果您想了解更多关于FastTrack和季度发布周期发布的信息，请参阅这篇SAP 知识库文章。

如果您对本博文的内容有任何疑问，可以在下方发表评论。如果您有具体的产品或技术问题，请在我们的 SAP Analytics Cloud 问答论坛上提问。访问我们的 SAP Analytics Cloud 社区页面，了解更多产品信息、卓越实践等。查看我们的 SAP 路线图浏览器，了解 SAP Analytics Cloud 即将推出的更多功能。

entry.title: 回复： PDF Digital Signature with BTP SAP Forms Service by Adobe and Test with Postman
entry.content:
Hi, Ramonlee,

Customer can upload multi certificate into ADS . And mapping the certificate with people based on orgninzation like company code . Of couse the mapping will need additional logic  in CPI or cording based on the context .

Best regards!

Jacky Liu

entry.title: Report layout not showing in BPC Add ins using with EPM
entry.content:
Hello All,

When are trying to open the BPC Report using with EPM Add-ins it is showing like below screen. Could you please help me.

Thanks and Regards,

Venkat.

entry.title: Re: Where is the reference3 field in supplier invoice
entry.content:
Hi yrjin,

Just to clarify are you using the Create Supplier Invoice app or the Create Supplier Invoice app - Advanced?

The script calls out for Advanced

I don't have Korea enabled in my system, so I can't double check

Here is the link to the Help:

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/6418c31b58e840619e5e74885df6d3b4/50bbcea64ef94acd9a6d1eebcd7399f7.html?locale=en-US

"To enter data in the reference 3-field this field must be customized accordingly with field status groups. To get to this field press the ‘more data’ button on the expense line. The information entered in the expense line item of the document is displayed in the entertainment expense list. Enter the address, company name and representative of the payment recipient in the text line of the expense line item. "

I hope this helps

Thank you

Jerry

entry.title: SAP Build Apps corrupted version history
entry.content:
Hello everyone, I need help urgently,

Today, an error occurred while saving my project changes, and then I lost a significant part of a very important logic in my application. Additionally, the version history is corrupted

My project has been running for several months, but the oldest history shown is from 12 hours ago. Is there any way to view older histories to try and recover a version? as these recent ones are corrupted!

I'm asking for your help because I've lost a lot of work!

Thank you

entry.title: Re: Register new Service Unit in Cloud Control Center
entry.content: hi EunSeok thank you for this reply... but still not solving the issue

entry.title: Re: Register new Service Unit in Cloud Control Center
entry.content:
hi Eun seok

Service unit is up

 

And sld agents

 

 

I still cannot add instance Databases to create Common Database. I need to add these to create a new Service Unit

entry.title: SAP BUILD PROCESS AUTOMATION GETTING ERROR 500 IN RBSC PORTAL FOR AGENT UPDATE
entry.content:
Hello all,

i am getting error in SAP BUILD PROCESS AUTOMATION ( for setting up Desktop Agent 3) while going to SAP BUILD LOBBY > CONTROL TOWER > AGENT UPDATE > RBSC PORTAL 

 

 

 

ERROR - 

 

If anyone has any clue of why this error is coming up please do let me know too. Since i can't find any relevant blog post.

 

Thanks,

Rahul Pillai

SAP Build Process Automation SAP Build Apps

entry.title: Re: S/4HANA Business Partner Replication
entry.content:
Hi All,

I am trying to get the credit segment data from table UKMBP_CMS_SGM out as part of the BP replication payload. Can somebody help me how to achieve this?

Thanks in advance.

Kind Regards

Shantha

entry.title: SQL Caught Rabax
entry.content:
Dear All,
Please help for this problem,
pop-up always show when user access tcode

this what i got from sbwp

I am using SAP_BASIS 754

Thanks

entry.title: Re: how to register Web Client on Cloud Control Center
entry.content:
Hello,

Web Client needs to be registered in the software components beforehand.

 

Regards

EunSeok

entry.title: Re: SAP Build Apps corrupted version history
entry.content:
There is few bugs with that as now as far as i observed. 

Additional there is no way we could get backup of very old roll back. 

In that case what i used to do is to get backup after every major update in logic. Like export the project as mtar file and rename files to V1(Version 1), V2(Version2) and so on. 

and note the changes made to each version in a Excel sheet.

Thanks.

Rahul

entry.title: Re: Register new Service Unit in Cloud Control Center
entry.content: I see you use "b1cadm" user for authentication. however the user is typcially meant to be a B1 Cloud Administrator user to authenticat the Cloud Control Center as an administrator. To authenticate DB server you need to input DB user such as "SYSTEM".

entry.title: Re: Vendor Rebates - SAP S4HANA
entry.content: This article is very informative. Keep it up!

entry.title: Re: Where is the reference3 field in supplier invoice
entry.content: Thank you for your reply. I used the advanced.

entry.title: Re: SAP Build Apps corrupted version history
entry.content:
Hi Rahul,

I also haven't noticed many bugs, and I'm concerned because this was the first time it happened!

The backup that would help me is from no more than two weeks ago, it's not very old.

I'll continue looking for a way to recover the lost logic. Thank you for the tip about version control!

entry.title: Re: Fiori My Paystubs V3 download button not displaying on Android devices
entry.content: Hi Kenneth, SuccesssFactors mobile app does not support Fiori My Paystubs - https://me.sap.com/notes/0002736531 . If your question is concerning mobile browser experience, then please create a support ticket for our team to investigate.

Thanks

entry.title: SAP Build Process Automation - Test mail not working
entry.content:
I have created a destination for sending mail from SAP Process Automation. All the properties are added correctly as mentioned in the below blogs. Even though when I try to test the mail functionality I got error.

Blogs:

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/send-emails-from-automation-without-outlook-in-sap-process-automation/ba-p/13542436 

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-q-a/mail-destination-on-sap-build-process-automation/qaq-p/12654497 

Error:

 

Destination: 

 

Note: The Gmail password I generated was in the below format, so entered the same with whitespaces
           abcd efgh ijkl mnop

entry.title: Re: How do we dynamically add or map link in forms create...
entry.content: Hello Dan,

entry.title: Re: Seasonal Maintenance strategy
entry.content: Greetings. I believe that in a multiple counter plan only one dimension can be time based (error message IP493).)

entry.title: Re: EWM LOSC - how to choose any source HU
entry.content: Hi Juergen,thank you for the answer. My process is following: 1) from receiving putaway into destination st. type 20202) Replenishment with LOSC from st. type 2020 - inter st. type REPV - destination st. type 2030  - it works fine in case I configured HU WH task to be created (two WT created for HU, first from 2020 to REPV, second B from REPV to 2030). System choose source HU and present it to user for picking, user pick by queue and scan source HU selected by system. Anyway, I dont want to system select source HU, I would like to let user to decide and select HU during first pick. Its possible if I change configuration to create product HU - but at this case the LOSC doesnt work and system creates only one WT - from 2020 to 2030 (but the user can scan any source HU). I believe the reason is, the system creates Product WH task and LOSC is not activated as LOSC requiring to have HU WH task.....

entry.title: Re: How do we dynamically add or map link in forms create...
entry.content: Hello Dan, I want to provide a dynamically read the link value from some earlier step in the process and then populate the link dynamically through a varibale/paramater inside the form. Thank you

entry.title: Re: EWM LOSC - how to choose any source HU
entry.content: Sorry for formating, it didnt let me to change it. also I did typo, i wrote "Its possible if I change configuration to create product HU" but i meant "Its possible if I change configuration to create product WT"

entry.title: Re: How do we dynamically add or map link in forms create...
entry.content: Yes, you can bind the link value to some other object from a previous step. You can calculate with a decision or take from an API or whatever you want. Soon you will be able to even use a script 😺

entry.title: [BYD] Is that possible to change the planned date manually for pick task?
entry.content:
Dear SAP,

When I create the pick task in ByD system, I found the field “End Date” is read only,
This field will impact our interface between ByD and WMS system.
Could we modify this field manually?

Best regards


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: [BYD] Is that possible to change the planned date man...
entry.content:
Dear customer,

 

The planned end date in warehouse task comes from the requested delivery date in customer demand.

Therefore, this value cannot be changed neither from UI end nor from API side since it is calculated while checking ATP.

But you can choose change Planned Start Date & Actual Execution On instead while confirming warehouse task.

 

Best regards,

Gavan

SAP Technical Support, Public Cloud ERP

entry.title: Re: EWM LOSC - how to choose any source HU
entry.content:
Hi Stanislav,

LOSC works as well for product task with hu movement. But HU must be known. In your case LOSC should work as well if you use RFUI to confirm the task. When HU is picked to resource HU-Wt created from resource to the destination bin, and at this point of time LOSC is triggered, and resource gets open LOSC tasks to move hu to the intermediate bin.

BR,

Daniil

entry.title: Re: EWM LOSC - how to choose any source HU
entry.content: Do you mean HU must be known and first LOSC WT must be created with HU number inside? At this case its really timeconsuming as user will need to search whole pallet for specific HU (we have HU management on Box level)

entry.title: Re: Attachment mandatory for particular business users only
entry.content: I have made Attachment tab mandatory with the use of SDK. I looking for the code/syntax to make attachment necessary for particular business users only with the use of SDK.

entry.title: Re: SAP Build Apps asking login for Integrations

I created this destination in my cockpit.

Then in Data tab, I see he destination.

 

And then I can see the entities.

Also, the first screenshot in this thread has a name which I did not see in the tutorial.

entry.title: Re: SQL Caught Rabax
entry.content:
Hi,

The dump occurs in a Z transaction, which means it's not part of the standard SAP shipment, but was created in your customer system. So you'll have to debug it on your side. Likely there's an SQL statement which is not selective enough and returns way too many rows.

BR,
Alex

entry.title: Re: unable to delete items from Cart in Shopping App in S...
entry.content:
It is tough to diagnose without seeing more of the project (I wish we could just add a project file to a question).

Purchase Issue

The message comes about when you are sending input parameters of the wrong type. If you use developer tools, you can see the data that is being passed and make sure this confirms with the process requirements.

You can see the proper JSON in the Control Tower > Environments > Triggers

 

Delete issue

Tough to know if I do not see ... what message are you getting? What is your logic? I would think that perhaps the wrong ID is being sent to the CAP service, but it depends on what the nature of the error is.

entry.title: Re: SQL Caught Rabax
entry.content:
Hi Alex,

Since it is a Z transaction you have to enable the ST12 trace to check the overall expense SQL statement with the help of ABAPer to fix or create the Z index for the expense SQL statement to avoid the dumps.

Regards

SS

entry.title: Re: Generic ABAP utility class to upload and download Exc...
entry.content:
As I previously said, it's not a question.

Anyway, whatever you post it as a question or a blog post, you'd better describe it completely in sap.com, not explain it in the external Web site only, otherwise many people would post useless short information and require people to navigate to the Web site to understand what it is about exactly. So, to clarify, your tool has these limitations, copied from your repository:

  • ZCL_EXCEL_HANDLER is a general Excel upload/download handler class for SAP ABAP systems. It supports both XLSX and CSV file formats for uploading and downloading data between SAP and PC or application server.
     
  • FEATURES
    • Upload and download CSV files
    • Upload and download XLSX files
    • Support for both PC and application server file handling
    • Customizable CSV column separator
    • Header line handling for CSV files
    • Automatic data type conversion and validation
       
  • NOTES
    • Method upload_xlsx works only on Windows workstations with Excel installed and in foreground only (using OLE)
    • All other methods support upload and download on both PC (foreground) and application server (foreground/background)
    • The class handles data type conversions and validations automatically
    • Error handling is implemented using the ZCX_EXCEL_HANDLER exception class

entry.title: Re: Passing custom field to warehouse task
entry.content:
First of all, it is not possible to create picking task automatically after the outbound delivery is created and distributed to EWM.

It could be nice functionality for EWM. Maybe at some point of time SAP would implement it. Would be great to have some kind of automation which is triggered after creation or change of the object. If it be with flexible conditions for execution, it could be named something like "after processing framework" or similar.

entry.title: Re: SAP DM - ERP - EWM Integration/Staging Problems
entry.content:
Hello,

Please check if you see the Staging method download when an order is received on the DMC side? If not, the settings and master data for Staging need to be verified.

  1. /SCWM/PSASTAGE
  2. Activate PPF for sending
  3. Activate and properly configure the web services

entry.title: Re: EWM LOSC - how to choose any source HU
entry.content:
"Anyway, I dont want to system select source HU, I would like to let user to decide and select HU during first pick. Its possible if I change configuration to create product HU - but at this case the LOSC doesnt work and system creates only one WT - from 2020 to 2030 (but the user can scan any source HU). I believe the reason is, the system creates Product WH task and LOSC is not activated as LOSC requiring to have HU WH task....."

Then you do what Daniil describes. You process the WT with RF, then LOSC is working, also if there is no HU WT at the beginning.

Brgds

Juergen

entry.title: Re: SQL Caught Rabax
entry.content: Indexing of the question: SQL_CAUGHT_RABAX, TSV_TNEW_PAGE_ALLOC_FAILED.

entry.title: Best Approach for Master Data Integration from SuccessFactors(SF) to S/4 HANA Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

We are planning to implement master data integration from SuccessFactors(SF) to S/4 HANA Public Cloud. I would like to know the best approach for this integration. specifically

1. Should we use SAP Cloud Platform Integration (CPI) or SAP Master Data Integration (MDI) for this purpose?

2. Are there any additional recommended tools or services required to facilitate this integration

From My Research, I found that SAP MDI is often recommended for such integrations. also I found there are no standard Cost center and Organizational integration in SAP CPI for S4 HANA Public Cloud.

There is Standard I-flow for Employee Data Replication in SAP CPI but as per below post it should be used if our SAP S/4 HANA CLOUD is below 2308 Release. 

Link to the blog : Integrate SAP S4 HANA Cloud/on-premise with Succes... - SAP Community

However, I came across another blog that mentioned MDI is Moved to ABAP Adapter concept.

Link to the blog : Configuring the replication of Cost Centers from S... - SAP Community

Any insights, experiences, or updated information on this would be greatly appreciated,

Thankyou,

Anil

SAP Integration Suite  SAP S/4HANA Cloud Master Data  SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central

entry.title: Re: SQL Caught Rabax
entry.content: No need to use ST12, the faulty SELECT is shown in the short dump, and it's not an index problem, the problem has been explained by @alex_frank.

entry.title: Required Learning on New Learning Home Experience
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

Good day! I just wanted to confirm if what is the logic of courses being displayed on the Required Learning Section? Does it follow the learning plan configuration of display threshold? learningPlanRequiredItemsDisplayThreshold=90? In addition, can we rename the "Required Learning" tile to something else? Can we reword?

Hoping someone can enlighten me. Thank you for the help, I highly appreciate it

Best Regards,

Wayne

Please advise

entry.title: Re: SQL Caught Rabax
entry.content: It's not a database space problem, the problem has been explained by @alex_frank.

entry.title: Re: Creating Down Payment request without reference to an...
entry.content:
Dear Amar,

When you create Down Payment request in App Manage Supplier Down Payment Requests, keeping Purchasing Doc. Item field blank, resulting in following error(ME706):
"Item 00000 of purchasing document xxxxxxxxxx does not exist"

It is standard behavior to create PO item level Down Payment so that Down Payment request can be created with reference to PO.

It is a standard system design that in FI document you have to enter always PO + Item. It is not possible to enter only PO without item. Otherwise functions like PO history update would not work. This means the functionality to enter just a PO does not exists.

If you feel that the SAP S/4HANA public cloud customer base would benefit from an enhancement of this functionality you can raise a feature request via http://influence.sap.com.
KBA 2963059 - How to Submit Feature Requests for SAP S/4 HANA Cloud Product

Best regards,
Patrick

entry.title: Re: Difference between SAP S/4HANA :Public Vs Private edition : RISE with SAP
entry.content: Insightful knowledge shared. Thanks 😊

entry.title: Re: How to load customers (business partners) with SAP S/4HANA data migration cockpit
entry.content:
Hi @daniel_cunha1 ,

did you use the Vendor (extend by organizational unit) object?
Then it should only add the roles and the corresponding views.

Best regards,
Alex

entry.title: Re: Over-Delivery Qty Tolerance with the customer credit...
entry.content:
Hello,

Have to tried the "Overdeliv. Tolerance" setting in the Customer Master - Shipping Tab?

entry.title: Re: Combining MTO and MTS Processes for a Single Material in S/4HANA Public Cloud
entry.content:
Yes, it is possible to manage a single material using both Make-to-Order (MTO) and Make-to-Stock (MTS) processes simultaneously in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud. This is typically achieved by configuring different sales order types or settings for different scenarios. To enable this functionality, as an SD consultant, you need to configure the following: Material Master Settings: Configure the material master record with different MTO and MTS settings. You may use different production versions or settings for procurement types (e.g., 'E' for MTO and 'F' for MTS). Sales Order Types: Set up sales order types to handle MTO and MTS orders separately. This allows you to define different order types for different processes, which will be linked to the respective production strategies. Customization in SAP Fiori: Ensure that the Fiori apps and screens used for order processing are set up to handle both MTO and MTS processes as per your requirements. Production and Planning Settings: Configure the relevant settings in the Production Planning (PP) module to support both MTO and MTS scenarios for the same material. This includes ensuring that MTO and MTS orders can be processed and managed correctly. Consult the SAP documentation and configuration guides specific to S/4HANA Public Cloud for detailed steps and best practices. Thank you!

labcorp patient portal

entry.title: Re: -147 Get CurrentUserInfo failed on SAP connection using DI API
entry.content:
Hi @ANKIT_CHAUHAN ,

Any feedback please?

Kind regards,
Nicole.
